title: VQE Applications: Chemistry, Materials, and Beyond
description: Explore practical applications of variational quantum algorithms including molecular ground state calculations, materials science simulations, and optimization problems with hands-on implementations.
learningObjectives: Implement VQE for molecular ground state calculations
Apply VQE to materials science problems like lattice models
Solve combinatorial optimization problems using variational methods
Benchmark VQE results against classical methods
Identify suitable applications for near-term quantum devices
